2604.12255.title: ARGen: Affect-Reinforced Generative Augmentation towards Vision-based Dynamic Emotion Perception
2604.12255.paper_summary: Dynamic facial expression recognition in the wild remains challenging due to data scarcity and long-tail distributions, which hinder models from effectively learning the temporal dynamics of scarce emotions. To address these limitations, we propose ARGen, an Affect-Reinforced Generative Augmentation Framework that enables data-adaptive dynamic expression generation for robust emotion perception. ARGen operates in two stages: Affective Semantic Injection (ASI) and Adaptive Reinforcement Diffusion (ARD). The ASI stage establishes affective knowledge alignment through facial Action Units and employs a retrieval-augmented prompt generation strategy to synthesize consistent and fine-grained affective descriptions via large-scale visual-language models, thereby injecting interpretable emotional priors into the generation process. The ARD stage integrates text-conditioned image-to-video diffusion with reinforcement learning, introducing inter-frame conditional guidance and a multi-objective reward function to jointly optimize expression naturalness, facial integrity, and generative efficiency. Extensive experiments on both generation and recognition tasks verify that ARGen substantially enhances synthesis fidelity and improves recognition performance, establishing an interpretable and generalizable generative augmentation paradigm for vision-based affective computing.
2604.12255.paper_summary_zh: 動態面部表情識別在自然環境中仍然面臨挑戰，這是由於數據稀缺和長尾分佈，這些因素阻礙了模型有效學習稀有情感的時間動態。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了ARGen，一個情感增強生成增強框架，能夠進行數據自適應的動態表情生成，以實現穩健的情感感知。ARGen運行於兩個階段：情感語義注入（ASI）和自適應增強擴散（ARD）。ASI階段通過面部動作單元建立情感知識對齊，並採用檢索增強的提示生成策略，通過大規模的視覺-語言模型合成一致且細緻的情感描述，從而將可解釋的情感先驗注入生成過程中。ARD階段將文本條件的圖像到視頻擴散與增強學習相結合，引入幀間條件指導和多目標獎勵函數，以共同優化表情的自然性、面部完整性和生成效率。在生成和識別任務上的廣泛實驗驗證了ARGen顯著提高了合成的真實性並改善了識別性能，建立了一個可解釋且可泛化的生成增強範式，用於基於視覺的情感計算。
2604.12255.author: Huanzhen Wang et.al.
2604.12255.authors: Huanzhen Wang, Ziheng Zhou, Jiaqi Song, Li He, Yunshi Lan, Yan Wang, Wenqiang Zhang
